items.title: Princess Bha of Thailand, Second in Line to the Throne, Dies at 47
items.summary: Ever since she collapsed in a park three and a half years ago, speculation has swirled in Thailand about who could become the next monarch.

items.title: Rajasthan Minister's 'Singing, Dancing' Remark Amid Women Deaths Sparks Row
items.summary: Gajendra Singh Khimsar's comment - that pregnant women were in a serious condition and "did not come dancing and singing" - has triggered a storm
